commands.cmd:
if [ -n "${HOSTLENS_REDIS_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then
  info=$(REDISCLI_AUTH="$HOSTLENS_REDIS_PASSWORD" redis-cli --no-auth-warning -t 5 -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 INFO replication) || { echo "redis INFO replication failed" >&2; exit 1; }
else
  info=$(redis-cli -t 5 -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 INFO replication) || { echo "redis INFO replication failed" >&2; exit 1; }
fi
role=$(printf '%s' "$info" | awk -F: '/^role:/{gsub(/\r/,"",$2);print $2}')
if [ -z "$role" ]; then
  echo "role missing" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [ "$role" != "slave" ]; then
  printf '{"replication_configured":false,"link_healthy":false,"lag_seconds":null}'
  exit 0
fi
link_status=$(printf '%s' "$info" | awk -F: '/^master_link_status:/{gsub(/\r/,"",$2);print $2}')
last_io=$(printf '%s' "$info" | awk -F: '/^master_last_io_seconds_ago:/{gsub(/\r/,"",$2);print $2}')
case "$link_status" in
  up|down) ;;
  *)
    echo "master_link_status missing or invalid: $link_status" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac
if [ "$last_io" = "-1" ]; then
  lag_json=null
else
  case "$last_io" in
    ''|*[!0-9]*)
      echo "master_last_io_seconds_ago non-numeric: $last_io" >&2
      exit 1
      ;;
    *)
      lag_json="$last_io"
      ;;
  esac
fi
if [ "$link_status" = "up" ]; then
  if [ "$lag_json" = "null" ]; then
    printf '{"replication_configured":true,"link_healthy":true,"lag_seconds":null}'
  else
    printf '{"replication_configured":true,"link_healthy":true,"lag_seconds":%s}' "$lag_json"
  fi
else
  if [ "$lag_json" = "null" ]; then
    printf '{"replication_configured":true,"link_healthy":false,"lag_seconds":null}'
  else
    printf '{"replication_configured":true,"link_healthy":false,"lag_seconds":%s}' "$lag_json"
  fi
fi
